sentences.text: The choir performed a cappella in the cathedral.

Some artists tried to africanize imported styles with local themes.
The movement aimed to africanize the school curriculum.
Scholars debated whether the institution should africanize its policies.
They ordered a la carte instead of choosing the set menu.

The mountain range looked awesome from the plane.

Children played beneath the roots of the banyan.
The banyan spread across almost the entire garden.
His joke contained a barb aimed at the manager.
The hook had a sharp barb that caught in the net.
She ignored the little barb hidden in his compliment.
A heavy barge moved slowly along the river.
You cannot just barge into my office without knocking.
The workers loaded sand onto the barge.
The gardener protected each bazseedling from heavy rain.
A single bazseedling pushed through the dark soil.
They moved the fragile bazseedling into a warmer tray.

Honey was dripping from the damaged beehive.
His calm voice belied his fear.
The cheerful colors belie the sadness of the story.
Her smile belied the pain she was feeling.
The doctor confirmed that the tumor was benign.
At first, the weather looked benign and pleasant.
He gave me a benign smile before leaving.
She took bereavement leave after her father's death.
Counseling can help people deal with bereavement.
The group supports families through grief and bereavement.

He was afraid the machine would go berserk again.
The tabloids claimed she went berserk in the restaurant.
The brothers still bicker about money.
Small teams often bicker under pressure.
They continued to bicker through the entire drive.

Doctors examined the patient's bile levels.

Smoke began to billow from the warehouse roof.
Her dress billowed in the sea breeze.
Dark clouds billowed across the horizon.

The alarm began to blare at midnight.

The future looked bleak after the factory closed.
They crossed a bleak stretch of empty land.
His report offered a bleak view of the economy.
He seemed like a friendly bloke from the neighborhood.
That bloke by the door asked for you earlier.

ch: 拙劣的工匠／把事情搞砸的人

sentences.text: Bracken covered the hillside after the rain.

Bees buzzed around the flowers all afternoon.
The flood was a calamity for the farming town.

sentences.text: Some students excel in mathematics but struggle in writing.

Their friendship remained superficial for years.

ch: 不屈不撓的／持續不減的

sentences.text: The artist longed for untrammeled creative freedom.
They crossed an untrammeled stretch of wilderness.
The speech called for untrammeled debate.
I like to unwind with music after work.
It took days for the legal issue to unwind completely.
She watched the string unwind from the reel.
He unwittingly revealed the surprise to everyone.
The app unwittingly shared private information.
They unwittingly entered a restricted area.
